name: The Edge Ball
short_description: Your goal is to balance the ball and avoid it from obstacles and from falling down.
detailed_description: Your goal is to balance the ball and avoid it from obstacles and from falling down.
about_the_game: Your goal is to balance the ball and avoid it from obstacles and from falling down.

reviews.review_text:
A hastily made Unity game that is very limited when it comes to options, as well as correct spelling.
However, the core gameplay is fun, certainly better than most Unity games I've gotten for 39p.
If you liked the Ball skill game in Trials Evolution, you will enjoy this.
Recommended.

TheEdgeBall.

          What more could be said that hasn't been said, this game is one for the ages. The edge ball offers a flagship expirence for its players to go through. With its stunning triple A graphics (my 3070 struggled on this puppy of a game), and amazing story telling, I could see this game taking over at least 60% of the online player base on steam.

          To go even further in depth with this games levels of lore, texture, depth, and flavor; allow me to delve into the mind of a first time player of TheEdgeBall. When first loading up the game you are greeted with a embellishment of color and pop, whilst still keeping it mature themed. The stylistic choices made for the very pallet of color presented to the viewer in this game... god I can't even imagine how arduous a process one must go through to reach such an understanding of color.

         Upon death in TheEdgeBall, called resummoning in the community, you may notice what a simpleton will call a bug. You see, to challenge the mind of the player, the developers (UNDER WATER) (like the beckoning hopes of being they are) made it so that upon a resummoning the player will not be able to move. This I assure you is entirely intentional: the player must actually press the escape switch on their keyboard (called kikivaka in the community) and press no when prompted to exit to the menu of the game. This then returns the player (called the preposition later in the game) their juristicion of their globule. This is one of the many astonishing qualities of this prodigious game.

I am unable to put into words what this game has taught me.

Thank You TheEdgeBall,
For Everything

The Edge Ball is a game full of absolute beauty and fun. It comes with enough game play for hours and hours of fun. If I didn't have to eat or sleep, The Edge Ball would be what I would play for twenty-four hours, seven days a week, Three hundred, sixty-five days a year for the rest of my life. Let me explain why The Edge Ball is the best game, how it changed my life, and why it should receive Game of the Year for 2022.

          The Edge Ball is the best game in the entirety of the gaming world. Not only does it take aspects from the best games of 2021, like the patience required to play games like its ancestor, Amorous(another one of my top 3 games). It also takes aspects from Fortnite, like the skill needed to stay on your track to get the win. It also takes the accuracy required to play games likes Valorant or CS:GO. It also takes its movement from games similar to the no internet T-Rex game. You are ALWAYS moving forward. There are so many different ways to play this game as well. There are more patient game styles, but this game is probably the most interesting game to speed run. There are so many tactics that can be used like pausing the game to stop all of your momentum. Let me go onto my next topic.

          This game has changed by life for the better. I used to go outside, workout, and eat salads. It was a waste of time for my life. Not only have I gained 74 pounds giving me a natural body heater all around my body, I also got into eating foods that I can eat while I play The Edge Ball. For those wondering, foods like M&Ms, French Fries, and really any food high in sodium. Going outside was also a problem for me. It made me change colors, and made me start to turn tan. I would get sunburns. Now that I am inside for 24 hours a day, I am safe from the dangerous sun rays.

          Lastly, we must talk about why it should be Game of the Year for 2022. It may have released in 2018, yes, but that shouldn't take away its ability to be apart of now. It has had a large boom in players within the year of 2022. In 2021 it had about 2 active players. As of today, it has DOUBLED that amount. It has had probably one of the largest boom in players since the release of Among Us. The game may seem like it has a few bugs like when you fall off the edge, you can't move when respawned. Not only is there the easy solution of pressing the escape key on the top left of your keyboard, and then inputting the no option when prompted to exit the game, but the content in the game makes up for this small error in the code. This game should also receive Game of the Year 2022 because of its beyond amazing graphics, and its more than enjoyable game play.

After a review of my analysis on the game, The Edge Ball, and on why it is the best game in the world, how it has changed my life for the better, and why it should receive Game of the Year, I hope you, the reader, can agree with me on my statements. The Edge Ball is not just a game, its a life style. Thank you for taking the time out of your day to read my Persuasive essay on The Edge Ball.
